title: Chapter 799
content:
The Technician was sure that there was much more to Star Energy, but he also knew that Nick was essentially the leader of humanity's true resistance.

He was the one who controlled the secret research camp, and he was also directly working with the Sun.

The Technician knew that Nick knew more about the true state of the world than anyone else.

Sure, the old Champion of Light once used his ability to create an isolated space in which he could tell them everything he knew, but that had been a one-time thing, and it had angered the true enemy tremendously.

They didn't know what he had told the Shields, but they knew that he had gone behind their backs.

Because of that, they had weakened him tremendously until it was time to create a new Champion.

Naturally, the aliens had also considered killing all the Shields, but that would be wasting a gigantic chunk of time and progress.

The aliens were running a business, and they needed to produce Zephyx.

With time, the Shields would die either way and as long as the Champion didn't personally isolate them from the Sun again, the new Shields wouldn't be able to learn of whatever it was the old Champion told them.

The new Champion kept everything in check, and the old Shields would not be able to share their knowledge anymore.

With the addition of the Sun's new image as humanity's protector, things would also change for the better with time.

The aliens had been more honest with the old Champion.

They had told him that he was supposed to supervise humanity.

But with the new Champion, they went a different route.

They claimed that they were protecting Earth, and the Champion believed it.

Yet, neither the old Champion nor the new one could hold a candle to what Nick knew about the true state of the world.

Nick had been inside a machine that produces Prephyx.

He had seen an alien in person.

He had access to the suppressed Adversary.

He was working for the Sun.

The Technician and the Left Arm knew that Nick held the most knowledge about the world out of all of them.

Because of that, they did whatever he suggested.

Nick was the leader of humanity's resistance, and when he said that humanity should focus on transforming Star Energy into physical weapons, the Technician would do just that. ŔΑ₦
